title: Merry’s Seven Wishes
description:
A heartfelt visual novel that blends emotional storytelling with interactive gameplay.
After the passing of his beloved wife Merry, Richard’s world is drained of all color, leaving him in a gray void of sorrow. Just when it seems he has lost everything, he discovers a letter containing Merry’s seven final wishes — a path that may lead him back to hope. 

With each wish fulfilled, the world slowly regains its colors. Through touching dialogue, evocative music, and a series of unique mini-games, players experience Richard’s journey of grief, love, and healing. Every step forward paints his life with new meaning, reminding him that even in loss, beauty and hope can be found.

This is a short but deeply emotional experience, crafted for players who enjoy visual novels with strong narratives, themes of love and loss, and a gentle mix of interactive elements. By the end, you’ll discover that sometimes the smallest wishes can bring the brightest colors back into life.

Available in English, German, Italian, Ukrainian, French, Spanish, Russian, and Brazilian Portuguese with full interface and subtitle support.
description_short: A touching visual novel about love, loss, and hope. After Merry’s death, Richard’s world turns gray—until her seven final wishes begin restoring its colors. Through heartfelt storytelling, music, and mini-games, every fulfilled wish paints life in new shades of meaning.
